allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd;$env:Path"; git --version; if \(Test-Path .git\) { Write-Output "REPO_EXISTS" } else { Write-Output "NO_REPO" }; if \(Test-Path .gitignore\) { Write-Output "GITIGNORE_EXISTS" } else { Write-Output "NO_GITIGNORE" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd;$env:Path"; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)
